creator: Olivier.Girard@univ-angers.fr
text:
Le 24/01/2013 18:00, Edwin Groothuis a écrit :
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak,
>
> Please note that PR ports/175547 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175547
>
I Agree this patch, Feel free to update/modify this port as needed.

-- 
Olivier Girard
